title: REPUBLIC DAY CELEBRATION
description: There will be a celebration on the occassion of republic day 26th January 2025 in school campus
author: Principal

title: RTE ADMISSION 2025-26
description: RTE Admission for session 2025-26 has been started. Please contact to Admin Block for more information or visit RTE section of the website.
author: Principal

title: HOLIDAY - GANESH CHATURTHI
description: The idol of Shri Ganesh ji was placed in our school. The sacred program of Ganpati Visarjan Mahotsav will be held on 04/09/2019 at 04:00 pm. All of you are invited. हमारे विद्यालय में श्री गणेश जी की मूर्ति स्थापना की गयी थी। दिनांक 04/09/2019 को सांय 04:00 बजे गणपति विसर्जन का महोत्सव का पावन कार्यक्रम होगा। आप सभी सदर आमंत्रित है।
author: Principal
